title: Stats Dashboard Overhaul
rationale: Current stats are basic stat cards. Adding canvas-rendered charts and deeper analytics increases session time and gives players reasons to return (replayability weakness).

items.title: Daily playtime tracking + Time Played Per Day bar chart
items.description: Track playtime per calendar day in lifetimeStats.dailyPlaytime map. Render last 14 days as a canvas bar chart in the stats modal.
tests: Open stats modal → bar chart shows today with time > 0 after playing
Days with no play show empty bars

items.title: Stars Over Time cumulative line graph
items.description: Add completedAt timestamp to level progress on first completion. Render cumulative stars earned over time as a canvas line graph.
tests: Line graph shows cumulative star count growing over time
Existing levels use lastPlayed as fallback for completedAt

items.title: Gate Efficiency sparkline per chapter
items.description: For each chapter, compute average (bestGateCount / optimalGates) ratio. Render as inline sparkline bars colored green/yellow/red.
tests: Each chapter shows a ratio bar
Green for ≤1.0, yellow for ≤1.5, red for >1.5

items.title: Solve Time Distribution mini histogram
items.description: Bucket bestTime values across completed levels into time ranges (0-30s, 30-60s, 60-120s, 120-300s, 300s+). Render as mini histogram.
tests: Histogram shows distribution of solve times
All completed levels accounted for

items.title: Most Replayed Levels list with attempt tracking
items.description: Add attempts counter to level progress, incremented each time RUN is pressed. Show top 5 most-attempted levels.
tests: Attempts counter increments on each RUN
Top 5 list shows levels sorted by attempts desc

items.title: Session history table
items.description: Track session log entries (date, levels played, stars earned, time spent) in lifetimeStats.sessions array (keep last 20). Render as compact table.
tests: Session logged on gameplay exit
Table shows last sessions with correct data

items.title: Skill Progression line from adaptive difficulty
items.description: Read SkillTracker.history (already exists) and render score over time as a mini canvas line chart.
tests: Line chart shows skill score progression
Empty state handled gracefully

items.title: Export stats as shareable summary text
items.description: Add 'Export Stats' button that generates a formatted text summary and copies to clipboard.
tests: Button appears in stats modal
Clipboard contains formatted text on click

items.title: Compare with Average pseudo-averages on charts
items.description: Overlay a 'community average' line on the Time Played and Gate Efficiency charts using plausible pseudo-averages.
tests: Dashed average line visible on charts
Average values are plausible

items.title: Lazy chart rendering — only draw when stats modal opens
items.description: Charts are rendered via requestAnimationFrame callback only when the stats modal becomes visible. Canvas elements created on open, destroyed on close.
tests: No canvas elements exist before opening stats
Canvas elements removed on modal close
